name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: I'd like to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Over the past year, we have seen what happens when Republicans control both chambers of Congress and the presidency.

Tax breaks for large corporations and the wealthiest at the expense of working Americans, massive cuts to healthcare, budget proposals that slash Medicare, Social Security and Food Stamps, and lock-step allegiance to the NRA despite widespread public support for commonsense gun laws. The list goes on and on.

**Republicans have shown that they care more about promoting the agenda of powerful lobbyists than about acting in the interests of the vast majority of the American people.**

I wish I could say that this record is certain to propel Democrats to a resounding victory this November so we can put this country back on track. But the hard truth is, it's not that simple. More than half the Senate Democratic Caucus is up for re-election in 9 short months -- 26 Senators!! -- and each state and every race is different.

_We can take nothing for granted._

Together we need to work our hearts out to make sure that Democrats are fired up and organized and TURN OUT on November 6 so we can put this country back on track. That means we must end governance by tweet, put the interests of working families at the center of our national agenda, return confidence in what America stands for, stop the endless corruption and favors for corporate friends and foreign business partners, and restore basic accountability.

[**Please click here to let me know that you are still in the fight to help us win back the Senate. If you can make a donation of $5 or $10, that 's great -- we need you. But either way I'd like to hear from you.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9187f/70cdc2ba/46062c95/3903b81/1061321141/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/help-democrats-win-in-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+click+here+to+let+me+know+that+yo&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180228&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180228")

Thank you for all you do.

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

name: Bob Casey
subject: Can't risk this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
Friends,
A pro-Trump Super PAC is plotting to spend **$100 million** to defeat Democrats like me - and President Trump is piling on support for my likely opponent, a right-wing extremist. **All because they _know_ Pennsylvania is a critical battleground for Senate control.**
With everything at stake for working families, we simply can't risk losing this seat. But right now, with just five hours until this month's most critical deadline, we're still $3,900 short of where we need to be.
**[**Can I count on you to give $5 or more before midnight to defend this seat from President Trump's hand-picked candidate and protect our shot at taking back the Senate?**](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6a6e/51dbcc2a/96705c1/3a36e08/2929673792/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGs2NDQtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=jtk644-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: Janus v. AFSCME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
The billionaire class and GOP will stop at nothing to divide us
#
Friends,
The billionaire class and GOP will stop at nothing to divide us while they get richer. We cannot let them. From teachers in West Virginia to Uber drivers in Seattle, all over the country working people are demanding their rights to bargain collectively for fair wages and benefits.
That is their strategy in _Janus v. AFSCME_ , the most dangerous Supreme Court case for workers' rights in decades. This case will decide whether public sector employees in several states, who benefit from the union's collective bargaining, pay a representation fee in place of dues. This decision can eliminate the right of the state to decide and will weaken public sector unions and their bargaining power.
We need to get back to the organizing basics and stand with our union brothers and sisters. Bargaining rights in the US are already at the bottom for global democracies. Our Revolution is committed to organizing politically to reverse this.
[**Chip in $5 before our end-of-month deadline to support our organizing efforts with 554 local groups and counting across America.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace9/bed43eb/427cb729/75fe0d0f/1332984402/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180228-janus")
We build the power to fight back through grassroots organizing. In the workplace, on campuses, in neighborhoods and within the Democratic Party, progressives and people who care about our future are talking to each other to fight back against the corporate, Wall Street agenda including _Janus v. AFSCME_.
This moment is about solidarity with our working brothers and sisters. Whether you are retired, preparing to enter the workforce or belong to a union yourself, we need your help in the fight for an agenda that represents working people.
[**Contribute $5 to support our organizing efforts before the end-of-month deadline.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace9/bed43eb/427cb729/75fe0d0f/1332984402/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180228-janus")
No matter the decision in _Janus v. AFSCME_ , we will come together to fight back, and achieve the progressive future we all believe in.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We cannot afford to lose Sherrod
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | When I was first thinking about running for the Senate, a woman in her mid-fifties came up to me at a meeting. It was so hot outside that your eyelashes would frizzle -- and she had walked two miles to get there. She walked because her car didn't run -- and her car didn't run because she didn't have money to repair it. She'd been out of work for a year and a half. What she told me still sticks with me to this day: "I'm here because I'm running out of hope ... I want you to fight for me. I don't care how hard it gets, I want to know that you are going to fight." During the 2016 election, I went to Ohio -- and I heard similar stories from people in Cincinnati, Columbus, and Cleveland who worked hard, played by the rules, and just kept getting slammed with one gut-punch after another after another. **The people of Ohio and all across the country need to know that they have another fighter in their corner, and his name is Sherrod Brown.** [_**But I 'm worried about Sherrod's 2018 re-election campaign, Peter. A new poll shows that Ohio is once again moving in Trump's direction. Sherrod's behind on this month's goal -- can you help him fight back by making a contribution?**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fc/4462dc26/4fdec8ff/200085e6/3930722868/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI4eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fc/4462dc26/4fdec8ff/200085e6/3930722868/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI4eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180228z?refcode=sbe180228z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** We can't afford to lose Sherrod in the Senate. He's more than just an ally and trusted colleague -- as the top Democrat on the Senate Banking Committee, _he is one of the strongest voices demanding accountability and transparency from Wall Street._ From Wells Fargo to Equifax, just know there is a reason Sherrod was called "Wall Street's Nightmare on Capitol Hill." **Losing Sherrod 's leadership in the Senate would be a loss for millions of hard-working Americans. And every minute he has to spend raising money to fight the right-wing attacks is less time he can spend fighting for students, seniors, women, and working people in Ohio and across the country.** [_**Please match Sherrod Brown 's average contribution of $26 so that Sherrod and I can continue our work to level the playing field for American families.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fc/4462dc26/4fdec8ff/200085e6/3930722868/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI4eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180228z?refcode=sbe180228z_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | | | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fc/4462dc26/4fdec8ff/200085e6/3930722868/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI4eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180228z?refcode=sbe180228z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

During the 2016 election, I went to Ohio -- and I heard similar stories from people in Cincinnati, Columbus, and Cleveland who worked hard, played by the rules, and just kept getting slammed with one gut-punch after another after another. The people of Ohio and all across the country need to know that they have another fighter in their corner, and his name is Sherrod Brown. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" We can't afford to lose Sherrod in the Senate. He's more than just an ally and trusted colleague -- as the top Democrat on the Senate Banking Committee, he is one of the strongest voices demanding accountability and transparency from Wall Street. From Wells Fargo to Equifax, just know there is a reason Sherrod was called "Wall Street's Nightmare on Capitol Hill." Losing Sherrod 's leadership in the Senate would be a loss for millions of hard-working Americans. And every minute he has to spend raising money to fight the right-wing attacks is less time he can spend fighting for students, seniors, women, and working people in Ohio and across the country. "" | | | "" Thanks for being a part of this, Senator Elizabeth Warren | "" "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

subject: Trump is destroying our national monuments
body:
NRDC is suing to protect cherished public lands.

(https://act.nrdc.org/letter/national-monuments-mj-180209?source=DEMMONPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email) (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/national-monuments-mj-180209?source=DEMMONPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email)

DONATE

Trump's Attack on Our National Monuments Is Illegal!

(https://act.nrdc.org/letter/national-monuments-mj-180209?source=MJAMONPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=actr&utm_campaign=email)

President Trump is dismantling national monuments so he can open them up for dangerous mining and oil and gas drilling — for corporate profit. Help us stop Trump's brazen assault on our public lands.

TAKE ACTION

Dear Activist:

President Trump and his Interior Secretary Ryan Zinke are abolishing some of our most cherished national monuments, one by one, so their friends in the oil and gas industry can profit off the destruction of America's cherished public lands.

Trump issued an executive order that dismantled the Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monuments in Utah. More than 2 million acres of these spectacular wildlands and cultural sites are now open for business to oil, gas, and uranium mining companies.

This attack on our monuments is dangerous and unprecedented — and it's illegal. So NRDC is suing the Trump administration to put an end to this dangerous scheme. But we need your help to keep the pressure on.

Tell Trump and Zinke that their destructive plan won't stand, and demand that our national monuments be protected today. (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/national-monuments-mj-180209?source=DEMMONPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text1&utm_campaign=email)

If we stand by and let them abolish two national monuments, what's to stop them from obliterating dozens of others across the country?

Make no mistake: An attack on one national monument is an attack on all of them. Trump and Zinke have a whole list of monuments that are next for the chopping block, from California to the waters off New England.

Trump's outrageous action is a clear effort to undermine the Antiquities Act — the bedrock environmental law that makes it possible for a president to permanently protect our national treasures for this and future generations.

Please join our efforts to stop Trump and Zinke by sending a letter of opposition today. Help NRDC put an end to Trump's illegal plan. (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/national-monuments-mj-180209?source=DEMMONPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text2&utm_campaign=email)

National monuments protect our environmental and cultural heritage, and they're also good for our economy. Outdoor recreation generates billions of dollars and millions of jobs every year. In 2016, a record 331 million people visited our national parks, contributing almost $35 billion to the U.S. economy.

We must do everything in our power to stop this dangerous scheme. Join NRDC in calling on Trump and Zinke to preserve our public lands.

We intend to do everything in our power to save Bears Ears, Grand Staircase-Escalante, and all of America's treasured wildlands and waters. Can we count on you to stand with us?

Sincerely,

Rhea Suh
President, NRDC

The mission of the Natural Resources Defense Council (NRDC) is to safeguard the Earth: its people, its plants and animals, and the natural systems on which all life depends. We combine the power of three million members and online activists with the expertise of some 500 scientists, lawyers, and policy advocates across the globe to ensure the rights of all people to the air, the water, and the wild.
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMjQ2LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMTkyNjA0MjMx

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: The White House
subject: How to win the war on opioids
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=306676db43c0ed063fe194c0af46c9aba3c97272e94d7d2913219d5390896a59191e52cfae75a1c1cbdfc3b730fca4a6084c3e5319067a9c

How to win the war on opioids

The numbers around drug addiction in the United States are staggering. In 2016 alone, an estimated 20.1 million Americans—about 1 in 13 people aged 12 or older—had a substance use disorder.

For President Donald J. Trump, addiction is more than just a policy issue. As a young man, he witnessed the pain of addiction in his family. Now as President, he is fighting back.

Today, the White House will convene a major summit on opioids. A number of senior Administration officials will join about 200 participants from across the Nation, including Americans who have suffered from opioid abuse or watched as a loved one struggled with such an addiction.

“It is time to liberate our communities from this scourge,” President Trump says.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=306676db43c0ed06dd2cd67d3b04f8e2053e5526bd9500f57049f5797a4901e2ae75321d7becd816119454d6fc1cffdff105fd07c99bbd3a
See 3 ways the entire Administration has mobilized to address this crisis.

The big picture: America’s resurgent economy

Inside the Beltway, people often forget that what matters most to ordinary Americans is results. And recent news showing surging small-business and consumer confidence, near record low unemployment claims, and expectations of continued economic momentum is good news for U.S. workers and their families.

A few headlines paint the picture:

- US Consumer Confidence Rises to Highest Level Since 2000 (The Associated Press)
- Record Number of U.S. Small-Business Owners Say It’s a Good Time to Expand (Bloomberg)
- U.S. Jobless Claims near 45-Year Low as Economic Outlook Brightens (Reuters)
- Fed Thinks the Economy Has Momentum, Thanks Partly to Tax Cuts, Global Growth (Washington Examiner)

After 8 years of a presidential administration not taking economic growth seriously enough, President Trump has committed to an agenda that puts U.S. workers and businesses first.

Learn more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=306676db43c0ed0635d8c970e408045afb8b8440f7812858e5f72ed94d1c8e9103256ae1c98c31dc7813610365eee1a2b38bdf1e6e0f5a02
Headlines that tell the story of America’s resurgent economy

Moving forward with school safety

President Trump hosted a bipartisan group of Members of Congress at the White House yesterday to discuss legislation to address the recent horrors of mass shootings.

Lawmakers shared ideas on a number of solutions, including improving Federal reporting on background checks, reforming FBI tip-handling procedures, increasing security at schools, and addressing emergency preparedness. The President has hosted a number of such listening sessions in the two weeks following the tragic school shooting in Parkland, Florida.

“This is bipartisan,” President Trump told the Members of Congress yesterday. “We’re determined to turn our grief into action. I really believe that. I think that the people at this table want it.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=306676db43c0ed06228c01af9ac6e6096970a5e246aaf83ba3ce645441522f51176d0df47c06282ad255e6726ea96b1bfdb243cb65c64274
Watch the President’s meeting with Members of Congress.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump honor the late Reverend Billy Graham | February 28, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will host a meeting about school safety before having lunch with Vice President Pence and Secretary of Defense Jim Mattis. In the afternoon, the President will meet with members of the Senate.

This morning, the Vice President will deliver remarks at the United States Department of Homeland Security's 15th Anniversary.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=306676db43c0ed06b3ecf3daa720c729aa842d4a3910da9f9d712fa237864eba343d73b7aa64351a09100d83fbda5b84423627262e0118c8
Privacy Policy |

name: Tom Perez
subject: Will you commit to vote, Derek?
body:
Be one of the first people to officially commit to vote this fall.
---
There is so, so, so much at stake this November, Derek.

If we lose, it could be catastrophic for our country -- and if we aren't organized, we could very well lose.

That's why we launched our get-out-the-vote initiative for the 2018 elections this week. We're calling it IWillVote -- because we know that when more people vote, more Democrats win.

**Will you be one of the first people to officially commit to vote this fall? Add your name today:**

**[COMMIT TO VOTE](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/IWillVote?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+COMMIT+TO+VOTE&utm_campaign=em_20180301_tp_nd&source=em_20180301_tp_nd")**
IWillVote is a national campaign to organize around the four key components of voting: register to vote, commit to vote, get out the vote, and protecting the right to vote.

We've set a goal of reaching 50 million voters through this effort, because we think that's the number of votes Democrats will need to have in order to take back Congress this November.

That's a lot of people, Derek -- and it's going to take a lot of work to reach out to all of them. But it will be a little easier if we know we can count on our best supporters like you. Once you commit to vote, we're going to ask for your help to get your friends and family to add their name alongside yours.

**[So don't waste another second: Add your name to say you are committed to voting for Democrats this fall.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522723/4067b0a/5701a0a12/7e56378d/4066449514/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/IWillVote?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+So+dont+waste+another+second+Add+your+na&utm_campaign=em_20180301_tp_nd&source=em_20180301_tp_nd")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522723/4067b0a/5701a0a12/7e56378a/4066449514/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180301_tp_nd&source=em_20180301_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522723/4067b0a/5701a0a12/7e56378b/4066449514/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180301_tp_nd&source=em_20180301_tp_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522723/4067b0a/5701a0a12/7e563788/4066449514/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180301_tp_nd&source=em_20180301_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522723/4067b0a/5701a0a12/7e563789/4066449514/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180301_tp_nd&source=em_20180301_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: a home run in February
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Today, I'm not here to tell you about President Trump's policies or what our opponents are saying about us. I'm here to tell you we notched another grassroots victory. **Thanks to you, we reached our February goal.** It was a short month -- and the stakes were high -- but you came through. My team and I are so grateful for your willingness to devote time, energy, and financial contributions to our campaign. **Now, it 's time to get back to work.** It's almost Spring, and one of my favorite pastimes is already underway: **Spring training.** The Cleveland Indians are busy training, vying for roster positions, and preparing for the season ahead. This is where they make sure they're battle-tested and ready to win on Opening Day. Our grassroots team is also in Spring training. In baseball, you can't step up to the plate on Opening Day and expect to knock one out of the park if you don't put in the work. The same goes for politics. We can't expect to bring home a victory on Election Day unless we build a strong grassroots game now. February proved we're on the right track. Thanks for all your hard work. Make sure you're receiving updates from our campaign on Facebook. If you haven't already, go to my [**_Facebook page_**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4f2/4462dc26/4ffe6be6/20008af6/488255417/VEsH/ "http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/180301FB"), click Like, and then click the Follow button to never miss a post from Team Sherrod. With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: The number of elections in 2018 is massive
body:
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180301apl01ndb&n=1)
Dear Peter,
The secular progressive Women's March have launched a massive grassroots effort to register and mobilize their voters to the polls. It’s called “Power to the Polls” and one of their largest sponsors is Planned Parenthood.
**During the 2017 Women’s March, speakers dropped F-bombs and wore female genitalia on their head. It was enough to make anyone think twice about supporting women’s causes, especially Christians. In addition to the march's vulgarity and verbal violence, it also championed abortion and banned pro-life groups from officially participating.**
**This year the movement has shifted focus from shouting their outrage at marches to harnassing voting power.**
Why? Because, though it’s hard to believe, there are far more elections taking place in 2018 than there were in 2016! We have documented over 8,500 elections that will take place across the United States in 2018, and we estimate it will be closer to 9,000 in total.
Peter, do you want the anti-life beliefs of the Women’s March and Power to the Polls to prevail in these elections?
They will if we don’t act.
**This is why we must begin mobilizing Christians now, or we will lose any ground we may have recently gained for Christian principles!**
Voting numbers tell us there are tens of millions of Christians that sit on the sidelines during Presidential elections, and voter turnout is significantly worse in midterm elections.
But we have a proven plan to ensure millions of Christians stand united at the polls this year – and with your help we can reach them.
[Please consider making a donation to help us mobilize an army of Christian voters to bring _true power_ to the polls this spring, defending Biblical Values!](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180301apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180301apl01ndb&n=2)
Now is the time for us to stand firm for the values that we hold dear starting with the human right to life.
[](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180301apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180301apl01ndb&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**

Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
My Faith Votes
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180301apl01ndb&n=4).
